manual_examples.question: I added Mindthief perks to my Spellweaver's character, does this follow the rules, or should perks be class-specific?
I drew a Null (miss) modifier card on my attack, but my attack had Pierce 2. Does Pierce 2 deal 2 damage anyway?
When setting up the scenario, I placed all the monsters for all rooms before opening any doors. Is this how setup works?

generated_examples.question: If a character is stunned and their ally uses a ability to remove the stun, can the character act on their next turn?
During scenario setup, can a player choose to place the starting monsters in any room, as long as the room is connected to the entrance?
If a character's attack hits multiple enemies with a single attack action, does each enemy draw a separate modifier card?
Can a character use an item during their turn, even if the item's effect would cause them to lose their action?
If a scenario has a special rule that overrides a standard rule, does the special rule apply to all characters in the party?
When a character levels up, can they choose to add a new ability from their class's ability list, even if they already have the maximum number of abilities?
If a character is pushed into a wall or obstacle by an enemy, can they still perform a ranged attack on their next turn?
During scenario setup, are players required to follow the specific instructions for monster placement, or can they use their discretion?
If a character's ability allows them to move through enemies, do they still trigger enemy attacks of opportunity?
Can a character use a battle goal to gain experience points, even if they did not complete the goal during the scenario?
If a scenario has a branching path, can players choose which path to take, or is it determined by the scenario's rules?
When a character retires, can they pass on their items and abilities to their replacement character?
